email.subject: Exploring Flexible Options with ZENPEP for Your Patients in South Chesterfield
email.email_body:
Dear Dr. Ford,

I hope this message finds you well. As a dedicated practitioner in South Chesterfield, your commitment to providing optimal care for your patients is truly commendable. I noticed that you have been prescribing CREON for your patients, and I wanted to introduce you to ZENPEP as a potential option that might align with your practice needs.

ZENPEP offers a non-enteric-coated microsphere formulation and is available in 5 strengths ranging from 3K to 40K lipase units, allowing for flexible titration to meet individual patient needs. Additionally, the ZenConnect co-pay program could provide significant savings for your commercially insured patients, potentially addressing any access concerns you may have.

I would be happy to provide more information on the APEX trial data or discuss how ZENPEP might fit into your treatment plans. Please let me know if you would like to explore this further.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
